---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature summary

A short, clear description of the feature or improvement.

---

## 🎯 User story (optional)

> As a [user type] I want [functionality] so that [benefit].

---

## 📋 Description

Describe the feature in more detail. What should the system do?

---

## ✅ Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

---

## 💡 Proposed solution

How do you think this could be implemented? (optional)

---

## 📎 Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you thought about. (optional)

---

## 📎 Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or links to similar features elsewhere.
